name: ChkStart_LINHeaderToleranceViolation
title: ChkStart_LINHeaderToleranceViolation
description: Checks the LIN header transmission time.
An event will be generated, if the measured header transmission time is over specified tolerance.

parameters.name: Tolerance
parameters.description: Allowed tolerance for Header transmission time. Value range: [0 .. 40]Unit: percents [%]

parameters.name: CaplCallback
parameters.description: Name of CAPL callback function to be called on generated event. In simulation nodes this parameter has to be set. In test modules this parameter is optional.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
